title: Ceezun's Better Shoulder Mounts [Cobblemon]
description: A huge expansion that lets tons of extra small Pokémon sit on your shoulder in Cobblemon, turning your adventures into a full shoulder-buddy experience!
body:
This datapack expands Cobblemon’s shoulder-mount feature by adding tons of new Pokémon that normally can’t sit on your shoulder. All default shoulder Pokémon are left untouched — this pack only adds new ones. Over 150 small and lightweight Pokémon are now able to perch on your shoulder, including starters, babies, bugs, rodents, birds, ghosts, and a huge variety of small species from every generation.

Nothing about the base game is replaced. No models or animations are edited. This simply tells Cobblemon that these additional Pokémon are allowed to use the built-in shoulder-riding pose. Just drop the ZIP into your world’s datapacks folder and load your world — that’s it. Any of the added Pokémon can now hop onto your shoulder the same way default ones do.

If you’ve ever wanted more partner-style Pokémon, more shoulder buddies for screenshots, or just a world where almost every small mon can tag along with you, this pack delivers exactly that without changing the gameplay or balance of Cobblemon.

Here are all of the included 159 Pokemon:

- Applin
- Aron
- Axew
- Azurill
